error_signature: rollup is not defined
title: Rollup function not defined in dynamic list generation
symptom: When attempting to generate a unique dynamic list from a table value, the error 'rollup is not defined' appears, indicating a problem with the function's recognition.

error_signature: unable to redirect to external URL using workflow
title: Cannot redirect to external URL in workflow
symptom: The workflow does not redirect the user to the payment authorization URL despite the correct URL being set in the 'change page' action.

error_signature: No valid data found
title: No valid data found during Excel export
symptom: The script returns 'False' when attempting to export data to Excel, indicating no valid data was found in the collection.

error_signature: capitalize formula breaks when condition is true
title: Capitalize formula fails with boolean variable true
symptom: The capitalize formula works when the boolean variable is false but fails when it is true, leading to unexpected behavior.

error_signature: new variable added instead of updating existing attribute
title: New variable added instead of updating existing JSON attribute
symptom: When changing a value in the line item details, a new variable is added to the JSON structure instead of updating the existing attribute.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading ‘reduce’)
title: Error reading properties of null in Voiceflow API integration
symptom: When attempting to connect Voiceflow to WeWeb via a POST API call, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading ‘reduce’)'. This indicates a failure in processing the API response or request data.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')
title: Error retrieving Webflow CMS collection list
symptom: When attempting to retrieve the collection list from the Webflow CMS using the REST API, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' occurs. This does not happen when using Postman.

error_signature: profileview variable is null on page refresh
title: Profile view variable loses data on page refresh
symptom: After refreshing the profile page, the profileview variable becomes null, resulting in no data displayed for the user profile.

error_signature: Record ID recYQARb3k8kilhn8 does not exist
title: Airtable linked record ID does not exist
symptom: When attempting to create a record in Airtable with a linked record, an error occurs stating that the record ID does not exist.

error_signature: Supabase authenticated requests return null in published project
title: Supabase requests return null in published WeWeb project
symptom: Authenticated API calls to Supabase return null responses in the published WeWeb project, despite working in the editor and Postman.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'map')
title: TypeError during Supabase user role verification
symptom: When attempting to verify user roles in Supabase, a TypeError occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'map')'. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.

error_signature: You are not authorized to perform this operation
title: Unauthorized error when creating a record in Airtable
symptom: When attempting to create a record in Airtable, the user receives a 403 response stating 'You are not authorized to perform this operation'.

error_signature: records not loaded dynamically based on order_id
title: Supabase records not loading dynamically with order_id filter
symptom: When attempting to filter records based on 'order_id', only records for the last order ID are loaded instead of dynamically updating based on the variable.

error_signature: Unable to process request
title: Supabase password reset request fails
symptom: When attempting to reset a password using Supabase, the system returns an error stating 'Unable to process request'. This occurs during the password reset flow.

error_signature: Request failed with status code 422
title: Airtable request fails with status code 422
symptom: When trying to send user data to Airtable, the request fails with a 422 status code, indicating an issue with the request format.

error_signature: field components not picked up by Form Containers
title: Field components not recognized in Form Containers
symptom: When using custom input components in the new form builder, they do not appear in the Form Container, while regular input fields work fine.

error_signature: redirects back to the sign-in page
title: Redirecting to sign-in page due to role configuration
symptom: After logging in, the user is redirected to the dashboard but is then sent back to the sign-in page when navigating to other pages.

error_signature: ERROR_CREATING_CMSDATASET
title: Conflict with multiple Xano data source instances
symptom: When attempting to publish the app, the user encounters the error 'ERROR_CREATING_CMSDATASET'. This prevents the app from being published successfully.

error_signature: Reference error: Capitalize is not defined
title: Capitalize function not defined in JavaScript code
symptom: The code throws a reference error indicating that the 'capitalize' function is not defined, preventing execution.

error_signature: undefined
title: Form fields not updating in Result object
symptom: The form fields are filled with user input, but the Result object shows 'undefined' instead of the actual values entered.

error_signature: images not displaying in published version
title: Images not displaying after publishing app
symptom: Images appear correctly in the editor but fail to display in the published version of the app.

error_signature: image not displaying
title: Image not displaying due to incorrect URL
symptom: Images are not displayed correctly in the application, while other text data appears fine.

error_signature: Database error saving new user
title: Error saving new user in Supabase
symptom: When attempting to sign up a new user, an error occurs stating 'Database error saving new user'. This prevents the user from being created in the database.

error_signature: 400 Bad Request
context_key: REST API call with null values
title: API call returns 400 due to null query parameters
symptom: When making an API call with empty input fields, the API returns a 400 Bad Request error. This occurs because the API does not accept null values for query parameters.

error_signature: returning nothing from the function
title: Returning nothing from multi-select function
symptom: The function fails to create multiple objects from a multi-select input, resulting in undefined values being returned.

error_signature: Cannot get container to scroll
title: Container not scrolling due to overflow settings
symptom: The container does not scroll despite attempts to set fixed heights and overflow properties. The content remains static within the parent container.

error_signature: columns display 'undefined'
title: Datagrid columns display undefined values
symptom: The datagrid columns do not show the bound data and instead display 'undefined' at page load. Clicking on the columns results in nulls or placeholders being shown.

error_signature: mouse pointer disappearing on overflowing element
title: Mouse pointer disappears when hovering over dropdown in datagrid
symptom: The mouse pointer disappears when it moves outside the datagrid, affecting interaction with dropdowns.

error_signature: input values not binding in repeating rows
title: Input values not binding in repeating Rows
symptom: When trying to bind text inputs inside a repeating row, the inputs do not appear in the variable list, and values cannot be stored.

error_signature: Unable to pull your bases, please make sure you entered the correct API key
title: Airtable plugin unable to fetch bases
symptom: The user receives an error message stating 'Unable to pull your bases, please make sure you entered the correct API key' when trying to fetch bases from Airtable.

error_signature: search bar fetches collection too frequently
title: Search bar fetches collection too frequently
symptom: The search bar fetches data from the API even when no input is typed, leading to glitches and incorrect search results.

error_signature: unable to parse CSV file columns
title: Parsing CSV file columns fails
symptom: The user is unable to extract data from each column of a CSV file uploaded in WeWeb. They receive no results when attempting to parse the data.

error_signature: auth plugin not visible after installation
title: Auth plugin not visible after installation
symptom: After attempting to install the WeWeb auth plugin, it appears to be installed but is not listed among the installed plugins. Consequently, the auth actions are inaccessible in workflows.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')
title: Error reading properties of null in Rest API
symptom: When attempting to use the Rest API to fetch data, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' occurs, indicating a potential issue with the data structure being returned.

error_signature: initial value not showing in multi-select
title: Initial value not displaying in multi-select
symptom: The multi-select component is not displaying the initial value set for the assigned user ID, despite being bound correctly.

error_signature: collection info not loading in published app
title: Collection info not loading in published app
symptom: The app works as expected in the editor, but the published version fails to load collection information. Users see discrepancies between the two environments.

error_signature: ReferenceError: mapboxgl is not defined
title: Mapbox GL JS not defined error
symptom: The WeWeb editor displays 'ReferenceError: mapboxgl is not defined' when trying to use Mapbox functionality. This prevents the mapping of points on the map.

error_signature: empty data structure when binding data objects to pin markers
title: Empty data structure when binding to Mapbox pin markers
symptom: When attempting to bind data objects to pin markers on a Mapbox map, the data structure appears empty, leading to no information being displayed.

error_signature: AxiosError: Network Error
title: Network Error with Xano plugin in WeWeb
symptom: When trying to add a collection using the Xano plugin, a 'Network Error' occurs. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.

error_signature: redirecting to default page due to private route
title: Redirecting to default page due to private route access
symptom: After clicking the password reset link, users are redirected to the default page instead of the intended confirm-new-password page.

error_signature: null objects in query.data array
title: Null objects in Supabase collection query results
symptom: When accessing the query.data array from a Supabase collection, there are numerous null objects present, leading to confusion about the actual data returned.

error_signature: public url not working from GetPublicUrl method
title: Supabase GetPublicUrl method returns incorrect URL
symptom: Using the GetPublicUrl method in WeWeb returns a URL from 'render/image' instead of 'object/public', resulting in a non-functional link.

error_signature: modal opens automatically on page load
title: Modal opens automatically instead of on button click
symptom: The modal appears open when the page loads instead of waiting for a button click. This is not the intended behavior.

error_signature: authenticated users data losing fields
title: User data fields lost during authentication in Xano
symptom: When authenticating a user in the Weweb editor, certain fields like name and email are lost while others remain intact.

error_signature: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403
title: 403 error during multi-step authentication login
symptom: Users receive a 403 error when attempting to log in with multi-step authentication, despite entering the correct code.

error_signature: app workflow never triggers
title: App workflow not triggering on Supabase database changes
symptom: The app workflow fails to trigger despite successful INSERTs being logged in Supabase. Users see no updates in the chat window.

error_signature: modified data not displayed until refresh
title: Modified user data not displayed immediately
symptom: After modifying the current user's first name in Xano, the change does not appear in WeWeb until a manual refresh is performed.

error_signature: Can't see a Xano table Endpoints
title: Xano table endpoints not visible in Weweb
symptom: The user cannot find the endpoints for a specific Xano table named 'contacts' in Weweb, despite having no issues with other tables.

error_signature: new row violates row-level security policy for table
title: Row-level security policy violation on Supabase
symptom: When attempting to insert a new row in Supabase, an error occurs stating 'new row violates row-level security policy for table'. This prevents the action from completing successfully.

error_signature: adding a list to a list results in nested arrays
title: Incorrect array merging leads to nested arrays
symptom: When attempting to add a list of values to an existing array, the result is a nested array instead of a flat array. This leads to unexpected data structures.

error_signature: start date and end date return 0 or null
title: Data picker returns null for start and end dates
symptom: When using the data picker in range mode, the start and end dates are returned as null or 0. This prevents sending valid date values to Xano.

error_signature: previous upload component variables were used
title: Incorrect variables used in form upload component
symptom: The file display issue occurs because the previous upload component's variables are still being referenced, leading to unexpected behavior.

error_signature: icons invisible on mobile
title: Phosphor icons not rendering on mobile devices
symptom: Icons are visible on desktop but completely invisible on mobile devices. This issue arose suddenly without any changes to the loading method.

error_signature: dropdown value not preserved on navigation
title: Dropdown value not preserved when navigating between tabs
symptom: When navigating between tabs, the selected value in the dropdown resets to unselected. Users expect their selection to remain intact.

error_signature: space is not generated when using a formula
title: Space not generated in data grid with formula
symptom: When using the 'Custom' option in the data grid component with a formula, the expected interactive space is not generated. This leads to a lack of interactivity in the grid cells.

error_signature: THREE is not defined
title: Three.js library not recognized in Weweb
symptom: When attempting to use the Three.js library, the error 'THREE is not defined' occurs, indicating that the library has not been properly loaded into the environment.

error_signature: auth plugin is not configured
title: Supabase auth plugin not configured
symptom: When attempting to connect Supabase auth, the user sees a message indicating that the auth plugin is not configured.

error_signature: ChartJS resets values to 0 on data update
title: ChartJS resets on dataset update
symptom: When updating the dataset in ChartJS, the chart resets its values to 0 before re-rendering. This disrupts the expected display of data.

error_signature: drag & drop element stops working when multiple is OFF
title: Drag & Drop File Element Fails with Multiple OFF
symptom: When the 'multiple' option is turned off in the drag & drop file element, the element stops functioning properly. Users cannot upload files as expected.

error_signature: 404 Not Found
title: 404 error when accessing magic link
symptom: When trying to access the magic link, the user receives a 404 error indicating the page does not exist.

error_signature: API does not recognize variable in JSON call
title: OpenAI API fails to recognize variable in JSON request
symptom: When attempting to use a variable in a JSON API call, the API does not recognize the variable, leading to errors. Using a direct link works, but the variable is needed for dynamic content.

error_signature: user_id is 0 when submitting comments
title: User ID not being saved in comments
symptom: When submitting a comment, the user_id field in the comment table is empty, showing as 0 instead of the actual user ID.

error_signature: unable to bind success/cancel page in Stripe Checkout
title: Binding Success/Cancel Page in Stripe Checkout Fails
symptom: When attempting to bind a success or cancel page in Stripe Checkout, the provided URLs do not work as expected.

error_signature: [object Object]
title: Supabase file upload returns [object Object]
symptom: When trying to access the signed URL generated from Supabase, the output is '[object Object]' instead of the expected URL string.

error_signature: Nav Bar not sticking to right-hand side
title: Mobile Nav Bar not positioned correctly
symptom: The mobile navigation bar is defaulting to the left-hand side instead of the desired right-hand side.

error_signature: Kanban component not stacking by integer field
title: Kanban component fails to stack by integer field
symptom: The Kanban component does not function properly when stacking elements by an integer field, such as 'Batch'. It works correctly with text fields like 'Status'.

error_signature: audio player buttons not functioning
title: Audio player buttons not functioning
symptom: The audio player buttons, except for the download button, do not work as expected. Users cannot play or adjust the volume of the audio.

error_signature: passing the entire Xano user auth object instead of just the id
title: Incorrect user ID comparison in conditional styling
symptom: Messages are displayed in the same color regardless of user ID, indicating a failure in conditional styling logic.

error_signature: filter function not retrieving database columns
title: Filter function not retrieving columns from Supabase
symptom: The filter function in the query configuration fails to retrieve database columns from Supabase, despite working previously. Users may see no results when applying filters.

error_signature: prevent users from entering more than four digits for the year
title: Date input allows more than four digits for the year
symptom: Users can enter more than four digits for the year in the date input field, causing the input to malfunction.

error_signature: date comparison fails due to time component
title: Date range filter fails due to time component in comparison
symptom: The date range filter on the datagrid does not return expected results when comparing dates from Xano due to the inclusion of time in the timestamp.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')
title: Error importing custom plugins due to undefined property
symptom: When importing a custom plugin, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')', rendering the plugin unusable.

error_signature: app doesn’t fetch the correct data from dynamic URLs
title: Dynamic URLs not fetching correct data on page load
symptom: When users open a shared direct link, the app fails to fetch the correct data, leaving the collection empty.

error_signature: collections are loaded twice
title: Collections fetched multiple times on page load
symptom: The collections Reunions, Courses, and Horses are being fetched twice during the page load process, leading to unnecessary data retrieval.

error_signature: current value is wrong
title: Incorrect boolean comparison in conditional rendering
symptom: The sidebar pop-up does not display even when the variable 'show_admin_menu' is set to true. The formula incorrectly evaluates to false.

error_signature: slice function does not work as expected
title: Array slicing function returns incorrect starting index
symptom: The slicing function on the array starts at index 1 instead of index 0, leading to missing the first element.

error_signature: form does not trigger submit
title: Form does not submit with button's form attribute
symptom: The button configured with the form attribute does not trigger the form submission. Users see no action when clicking the button.

error_signature: input reverts to previous text after update
title: Input value reverts after JavaScript update
symptom: After updating an input's value via JavaScript, the input reverts to its previous value when clicked. This occurs in a collection of items managed by Vue.

error_signature: row level security violation
title: Row Level Security violation when updating user roles
symptom: When attempting to update the Joining table of Users & Roles during sign-up, an error related to row level security is encountered.

error_signature: Invalid Date
title: Date display shows 'Invalid Date' on mobile
symptom: The date displayed on the mobile version of the app shows 'Invalid Date' instead of the current date when viewed on a phone.

error_signature: checkbox does not toggle on first click
title: Checkbox not toggling on first click due to workflow binding
symptom: The checkbox does not change its state when clicked for the first time, but the click event is logged. Subsequent clicks work as expected.

error_signature: data not displaying in input multiselect
title: Data not displaying in input multiselect
symptom: The input multiselect shows the initial value but does not display the list of options. The options are bound to a variable or a database but only the index is shown instead of the text.

error_signature: SVG images become blurry in mobile mode
title: Blurry SVG images in mobile mode
symptom: When viewing the web app on mobile, some SVG images appear blurry, while others do not. This issue does not occur when viewed in mobile mode from the Google Console.

error_signature: data not fetched on page load
title: Data not fetched on page load due to binding issue
symptom: When entering a page, the data from the collection is not fetched, resulting in 'NaN' displayed in dynamic fields.

error_signature: delayed conditional rendering with user variables
title: Delayed rendering of divs based on user variables
symptom: The incorrect div appears first before the correct one after a delay. This happens when using user variables for conditional rendering.

error_signature: 422 status code
title: Form submission fails with 422 status code to Airtable
symptom: When submitting a form connected to Airtable, the submission fails with a 422 status code. The payload structure appears incorrect, leading to the failure.

error_signature: events missing the last day
title: Calendar component missing last day of multi-day events
symptom: Multi-day events in the calendar component do not display the last day. Users see that events are cut off before the final day.

error_signature: file-picker removal icon missing
title: File Picker Removal Icon Not Displaying
symptom: The icon to remove an item from the file-picker list is missing, while other icons are functioning correctly.

error_signature: font size increased unexpectedly on iOS
title: Unexpected font size increase on iOS browsers
symptom: On iOS browsers, the font size for a Text element appears larger than specified, despite being set to 16. The computed font size shows discrepancies when inspected.

error_signature: TypeError: supabase.auth.updateUser is not a function
title: Supabase Auth updateUser function not found
symptom: When attempting to update a user's email using the Supabase Auth plugin, a TypeError occurs indicating that 'updateUser' is not a function.

error_signature: icons not displayed in rich text element
title: Icons not displayed in Rich Text Element
symptom: The options for icons in the rich text element are not visible, indicating a potential bug with icon loading.

error_signature: Markers not visible on Google Map
title: Custom markers not displaying on Google Map
symptom: The custom markers from Supabase are not appearing on the Google Map despite being set correctly in the code.

error_signature: select is probably returning the value as a string
title: Dropdown value type mismatch
symptom: The dropdown selection does not match the expected data type, causing issues in displaying the corresponding image and name.

error_signature: no update takes place despite success
title: Supabase update not occurring despite success message
symptom: The update operation appears to succeed in Weweb, but the data in Supabase remains unchanged. Users may be confused as they receive a success response.

error_signature: Empty List after binding Collection List
title: Empty List displayed when binding OrderDetails collection
symptom: On Test 2, the table shows 'Empty List' despite data being fetched from the OrderDetails collection. The data is visible in the results screen but not in the bound table.

error_signature: no tables showing when making a collection
title: No tables visible in Supabase plugin for second project
symptom: When trying to create a collection in a second WeWeb project using the Supabase plugin, no tables are displayed. This issue persists despite attempts to adjust Row Level Security (RLS) settings.

error_signature: pagination shows fewer records than expected
title: Pagination not displaying all records in Supabase
symptom: When navigating through pagination, fewer records are displayed than expected, and sometimes no records appear. The paginator shows a full table when going back.

error_signature: data not resolving in WeWeb from Xano collection
title: Xano collection not fetching all related records
symptom: When fetching data from a Xano collection, some related records are missing in WeWeb, despite being present in the direct API response.

error_signature: This value must be greater than or equal to 1
title: Stripe payment intent minimum value error
symptom: When attempting to create a payment intent with a price below the minimum threshold, Stripe returns an error stating 'This value must be greater than or equal to 1'.

error_signature: isAuthenticated=false
title: Authentication status shows false despite valid tokens
symptom: The authentication process completes successfully, but the isAuthenticated status remains false, indicating a failure in recognizing the user's authentication state.

error_signature: company name not loading
title: Company name not loading from XANO
symptom: The company name is not displayed on the front-end even though it is received from the backend. This results in incomplete data being shown to the user.

error_signature: decimal field not showing trailing zeros
title: Decimal field not displaying two decimal places
symptom: When using a decimal field in a text formula, trailing zeros are not displayed for values without hundredths. For example, 20.5 displays as 20.5 instead of 20.50.

error_signature: sending by application/json instead of multi-part/form-data
title: Incorrect content type for file upload to Xano
symptom: The file upload to Xano fails when the content type is set to application/json instead of multi-part/form-data.

error_signature: URL parameters don't work on staging
title: URL parameters not functioning in staging environment
symptom: When testing a deep link with URL parameters in the staging environment, the loading never completes. However, it works fine in the editor.

error_signature: CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header
title: CORS error when fetching images from CDN
symptom: When attempting to download images from a CDN, the fetch request fails with a CORS policy error indicating that no 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present.

error_signature: undefined redirect uri
title: Undefined redirect URI when using OpenID plugin
symptom: When attempting to authenticate using the OpenID plugin, the redirect URI is incorrectly set to 'undefined', causing the application to crash.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'files')
title: JavaScript block fails to access uploader files
symptom: When triggering the workflow in the workflow editor, a TypeError occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'files')'. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.

error_signature: users haven’t confirmed their account
title: User not logged in due to unconfirmed account
symptom: After signing up, the user is unable to write to the Supabase profiles table because they are not logged in. This occurs if the account confirmation is required.

error_signature: Missing param: field_value
title: Missing field_value parameter in Xano API call
symptom: When testing the function stack, the error 'Missing param: field_value' appears, indicating a required input is not provided.

error_signature: hover dropdown not recognizing mouse actions
title: Hover dropdown not working outside of Datagrid
symptom: The hover dropdown fails to recognize mouse actions when it expands outside the parent datagrid. Attempts to adjust Z-Order and Overflow settings have not resolved the issue.

error_signature: No response body will be returned by default
title: Missing ID in POST response from Supabase
symptom: After a successful POST request to Supabase, the response does not include the newly created record's ID, leading to confusion about accessing it.

error_signature: performance issue with Data Grid
title: Performance issue with Data Grid due to incorrect binding
symptom: The Data Grid displays a performance issue message and the editor becomes slow or crashes. This occurs when too many records are loaded at once.

error_signature: undefined text for team_type
title: DataGrid not displaying team_type correctly
symptom: After refreshing the page, the 'team_type' field shows 'undefined' instead of the expected value.

error_signature: data not binding to element
title: Data not binding due to language settings
symptom: Data fails to display on elements, regardless of static or dynamic content. The issue appears only in one project while another works fine.

error_signature: staging page redirects are not working
title: Staging page redirects fail after workspace move
symptom: Users are not redirected to the Home page upon authentication in the staging environment after moving the project to a different workspace.

error_signature: scroll function not working in modal on data overflow
title: Scroll function not working in modal with data overflow
symptom: Users are unable to scroll within a modal when there is an overflow of data, leading to content being inaccessible.

error_signature: Bearer token not added
title: Bearer token not included in REST plugin requests
symptom: When using the REST plugin with the 'send credentials' option, the Bearer token is not included in the Authorization header, leading to authentication failures.

error_signature: Dynamic icons do not work
title: Dynamic icons not displaying in mobile version
symptom: Icons are not displayed in the mobile version of the app, both in the app and mobile browser. This issue persists regardless of the device used to view the mobile version.

error_signature: unwanted data overwrite in Xano
title: Unwanted data overwrite in Xano from Weweb workflow
symptom: When updating user profile information in Xano via a Weweb workflow, some fields are unintentionally emptied.

error_signature: cursor for text input can't be set to pointer
title: Text input cursor not changing to pointer
symptom: The cursor for a read-only text input remains as the default text cursor instead of changing to a pointer as intended.

error_signature: empty deployment screen
title: Empty screen during first deployment
symptom: When attempting to deploy a project for the first time, the user sees an empty screen instead of a successful deployment message.

error_signature: sort order does not change
title: Table sort order not updating
symptom: The table does not reflect the updated sort order when the variable changes. The sort button is set to sort based on the variable, but it fails to apply the new order.

error_signature: Must be of type integer
title: Value must be defined as ID instead of name
symptom: An error message stating 'Must be of type integer' appears when trying to submit a form or data that requires an integer ID. This indicates that the expected data type is not being met.

error_signature: WeWeb doesn’t recognize old users as authenticated
title: Old users not recognized as authenticated after role management
symptom: Old users created before adding role management do not appear as authenticated in WeWeb, even after roles are manually assigned in Supabase.

error_signature: state style not applying
title: Tab button state style not applying in live version
symptom: The custom background and text color for the current Tab button works in the test version but fails to apply in the live version.

error_signature: project is hanging
title: Project hangs when loading in the editor
symptom: The project freezes shortly after loading in the editor, making it unresponsive. Attempts to interact with the project are met with delays or complete freezing.

error_signature: binding variable doesn't filter collection correctly
title: Binding variable fails to filter collection by Image ID
symptom: When attempting to filter a collection using a bound variable for Image ID, no results are returned, while using a static number works as expected.

error_signature: Failed to init Xano, please ensure your API key has the permission required
title: Xano API Key Permission Error
symptom: When entering a newly generated XANO API key in the Metadata API Key Configuration, the error 'Failed to init Xano, please ensure your API key has the permission required' appears.

error_signature: role not retrieved after successful login
title: User role not retrieved from Auth0 after login
symptom: After a successful login via Auth0, the user's role and permissions are not available in WeWeb. This leads to issues in accessing role-based features.

error_signature: ternary operator evaluating incorrectly
title: Ternary operator evaluates string as true
symptom: The ternary operator returns unexpected results due to string values being interpreted as boolean. This leads to logic checks failing when they shouldn't.

error_signature: date picker bug
title: Date picker not displaying correctly after first use
symptom: The date picker popup appears correctly the first time but fails to show on subsequent attempts.

error_signature: PGRST205: Could not find the table 'public.X' in the schema cache
title: Supabase plugin not listing all tables due to branch mismatch
symptom: The Supabase plugin in WeWeb only lists a limited number of tables, and fetching any missing table results in a PGRST205 error.

error_signature: container pushing content up with 'Link to'
title: Container content misalignment with 'Link to'
symptom: Using the 'Link to' feature on a container causes the content inside to be pushed up, disrupting the layout. Removing the 'Link to' restores the content to its centered position.

error_signature: InvalidTokenError: Invalid Compact JWS
title: Invalid Compact JWS error with Auth0 integration
symptom: When attempting to authenticate using Auth0, the error 'InvalidTokenError: Invalid Compact JWS' is displayed. The token also shows as having no payload when checked.

error_signature: Upload file element stopped working
title: Upload file element not responding
symptom: The Upload file element does not allow file selection when clicked, and no action occurs. This issue persists in preview mode.

error_signature: IFrame(tc-bordeleau-1-7FADNN-iframe) not found
title: Thrivecart checkout block not displaying on published page
symptom: The Thrivecart checkout block is visible in the editor and preview but not on the published page. Inspecting the page reveals an iframe not found error.

error_signature: user object not set correctly after auth
title: User object not set after Supabase authentication
symptom: After setting the auth token, the user object remains null, and isAuthenticated shows false despite successful token validation.

error_signature: Failed to send a request to the Edge Function
title: Error sending request to Supabase Edge Function
symptom: When attempting to call a Supabase Edge Function from WeWeb, the error 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function' appears.

error_signature: Stripe element not displayed
title: Stripe element not displayed due to missing client secret
symptom: The Stripe payment form does not appear on the published version of the project, and the associated div has 'display: none;'.

error_signature: invalid key
title: Invalid key error during file upload to Supabase
symptom: When attempting to upload a file to Supabase, the user encounters an 'invalid key' error message. This prevents the file from being successfully uploaded.

error_signature: unable to log the user in with the given response
title: Login endpoint returns challenge_id instead of auth token
symptom: When the login endpoint returns a challenge_id instead of an auth token, the user cannot be logged in, leading to an error in WeWeb.

error_signature: errors in console in the live app
title: Errors during Stripe payment confirmation
symptom: When attempting to confirm a payment with a page ID in the URL, errors appear in the console of the live app.

error_signature: concatenate expects to have a list of arguments, not an array
title: Concatenate function not handling array correctly
symptom: Using the concatenate function with an array results in unwanted comma delimiters between string values.

error_signature: True/False split always goes to True Path
title: True/False split always evaluates to True
symptom: The True/False split in workflows consistently directs to the True path regardless of the intended condition.

error_signature: only one item showing up in the chat UI
title: Chat UI only displaying one message
symptom: Despite multiple records in the data preview, only one message appears in the chat UI. The logs show all entries, but the repeater does not render them correctly.

error_signature: initial value not displayed in select input
title: Initial value not displayed in select input
symptom: The select input shows a placeholder instead of the expected initial value. Users expect the initial value to be displayed based on their configuration.

error_signature: CORS issue
title: CORS issue when fetching data from JSON API
symptom: When trying to fetch data from the specified JSON API, a network error occurs due to CORS restrictions.

error_signature: created_formated not displayed
title: DataGrid displaying created_at instead of created_formated
symptom: The 'created_formated' field is not displayed, and instead, the 'created_at' value appears.

error_signature: 404 error when accessing dynamic page via slug URL
title: 404 error on direct access to dynamic page with slug
symptom: When trying to access a dynamic page using its slug URL directly, a 404 error is displayed instead of the article content.

error_signature: end date needs to be 11 November to include data up to 10 November
title: Date range filter requires end date adjustment
symptom: When filtering data with a date range, setting the end date to 10 November does not return expected results. Users must set it to 11 November to include all data for the 10th.

error_signature: datagrid action submits form
title: Datagrid action triggers form submission
symptom: Clicking any action in the datagrid submits the entire form, even without workflows defined. This behavior complicates form validation and layout.

error_signature: onscroll workflow not firing
title: onscroll workflow not triggering for chat widget
symptom: The onscroll workflow for the chat widget element does not trigger when the user scrolls up, preventing old data from loading.

error_signature: sidebar does not appear on Apple devices
title: Sidebar not displaying on Apple mobile devices
symptom: When clicking the hamburger menu on Apple devices, the menu does not appear, although the icon disappears. This issue does not occur on Android devices or desktop browsers.

error_signature: Realtime subscription overwriting query parameters
title: Realtime subscription causing query parameter conflicts
symptom: Multiple users accessing the same WeWeb page with different URL parameters experience conflicts, as the query parameters are overwritten by the Realtime subscription.

error_signature: RATE_LIMIT_EXCEDEED
title: Email sending failed due to rate limit exceeded
symptom: When attempting to send an email using the Weweb email extension, the user receives a 403 error with the message 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEDEED'.

error_signature: no cookies present in API call
title: Cookies not sent from Weweb to Xano
symptom: When making API calls from Weweb to Xano, no cookies are included in the request headers, unlike when using Postman.

error_signature: input value is stored nor do I see the value in the event part
title: Input value not available in event for repeated rows
symptom: The user cannot access the selected values from dropdowns in repeated rows, and the event part of the workflow shows empty values.

error_signature: shows all activities from all tasks
title: Displaying all task activities instead of specific ones
symptom: When clicking on a task name, all activities from all tasks are displayed instead of just the activities for the selected task.

error_signature: no entry in view if fields are missing
title: No entry in Supabase view when fields are missing
symptom: Creating a new entry with empty fields results in no data being displayed in the view. The view does not show any records until all fields are populated.

error_signature: form validation triggers on modal open
title: Form validation triggers unexpectedly on modal open
symptom: When opening a modal from a button inside a form container, validation error messages appear on top of the modal.

error_signature: error when attempting to create the record
title: Error creating Airtable record with attachment
symptom: When trying to create a record in Airtable with a mapped attachment field, an error occurs due to incorrect data structure.

error_signature: Supabase is set by default not to show more than 1000 records
title: Supabase limit on records for dropdown options
symptom: When trying to bind a large collection to a dropdown, it fails to show all options due to a default limit of 1000 records in Supabase.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')
title: Error creating collection from REST API
symptom: When attempting to create a collection from a REST API endpoint, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' is displayed.

error_signature: text is disappearing with custom CSS for gradient color
title: Text disappears when applying gradient CSS to heading
symptom: The heading element becomes invisible when using custom CSS for a gradient color. The text does not appear as expected.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'photo_url')
title: Image URL undefined due to Supabase row limit
symptom: When trying to display images, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'photo_url')'. This happens intermittently based on the data fetched from Supabase.

error_signature: isAuthenticated not updated
title: isAuthenticated value not updated after Google login
symptom: After logging in with Google, the 'isAuthenticated' value remains unchanged, preventing access to private pages.

error_signature: invalid input syntax for type uuid
title: Invalid UUID format in Supabase query
symptom: The query fails because a non-UUID value is being used where a UUID is expected. This results in an error from Supabase/Postgres.

error_signature: OpenGraph data not working
title: OpenGraph data not displaying due to pre-rendering setting
symptom: The OpenGraph data for the live project is not functioning as expected, leading to issues with link previews.

error_signature: form not submitted due to invisible HTML characters
title: Form submission blocked by invisible HTML characters in Rich Text
symptom: The form does not submit even when the Rich Text field appears filled. The validation fails due to invisible HTML characters.

error_signature: undefined value when extracting from array variable
title: Undefined value when extracting from array variable
symptom: The user receives 'undefined' when trying to extract a specific field from an array variable after a successful query execution.

error_signature: returns blank object from the jsonplaceholder testing endpoint
title: Axios fetch returns blank object
symptom: The Axios call to the JSONPlaceholder API returns a blank object instead of the expected data. The console logs show 'No data fetched' or an error message.

error_signature: Preserve on navigation setting not saved
title: Variable preserve setting not saved
symptom: The variable retains old data when navigating back to the list view, despite settings indicating it should not. This leads to outdated information being displayed on the detail view.

error_signature: null or undefined result from JavaScript action
title: JavaScript action returns null or undefined
symptom: The JavaScript action intended to capture an image from the QR code reader consistently returns 'null' or 'undefined'.

error_signature: unexpected navigation on close button click
title: Unexpected navigation when closing side menu
symptom: Clicking the close button on the side menu unexpectedly navigates back to the home page instead of just closing the menu.

error_signature: undefined value returned in workflow
title: Undefined value returned from JavaScript action
symptom: The JavaScript action in the workflow returns 'undefined', causing subsequent steps to fail. The PDF is generated but not sent as an attachment.

error_signature: content scrolls sideways instead of vertically
title: Content scrolling sideways instead of vertically
symptom: The content overflows the visible area and scrolls horizontally instead of vertically, making it difficult to view all content.

error_signature: unable to get content to expand when sidebar collapses
title: Content not expanding with collapsed sidebar
symptom: The content does not adjust its width when the sidebar is collapsed, leading to layout issues.

error_signature: SVG icon color not changing
title: SVG icon color not changing in WeWeb
symptom: Users are unable to change the color of uploaded SVG icons through the WeWeb UI or custom CSS. The icons remain in their original color.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'map')
title: Supabase Auth Plugin cannot read properties of null
symptom: The Supabase Auth plugin throws a TypeError indicating it cannot read properties of null when trying to access user roles.

error_signature: CORS issue with trailing slash in domain
title: CORS issue due to trailing slash in domain
symptom: Requests to Xano fail due to CORS policy when a trailing slash is present in the domain. Users are unable to access data from Weweb.

error_signature: clickedRow variable does not record item.data.id
title: DataGrid row click not updating clickedRow variable
symptom: The clickedRow variable fails to store the item.data.id when a row is clicked, leading to issues in displaying modal information.

error_signature: scroll position tracking not working with symbols in ID
title: Scroll position tracking fails with symbols in ID
symptom: The scroll position tracking does not trigger as expected when IDs contain symbols or punctuation. Users see no data being captured from the scroll position.

error_signature: 404 not found error
title: Static page returns 404 not found error
symptom: When trying to access a published static page, the browser shows a 404 not found error. The slug appears correct in the editor but fails to load on the published URL.

error_signature: text not wrapping around image
title: Text not wrapping around image due to CSS settings
symptom: Text does not wrap around the image as expected when using float CSS. The layout appears broken.

error_signature: table element not honoring pagination
title: Table element not respecting pagination settings
symptom: The table element displays more rows than the specified max returned items, ignoring pagination settings. The pagination widget does not function as expected.

error_signature: id undefined
title: Supabase workflow triggers with undefined id
symptom: The workflow throws an error indicating that 'id' is undefined when trying to access it. This occurs even when a static id is set in the update.

error_signature: Text not inserted into rich text editor
title: Text not inserting into Rich Text Editor
symptom: When executing the JavaScript function to insert text, nothing happens in the rich text editor.

error_signature: data is not refreshing directly
title: Dynamic links not refreshing data in preview mode
symptom: When navigating to a detail page via a dynamic link, the data does not refresh automatically. The correct data only appears after manually refreshing the data collections.

error_signature: Metadata API key has expired
title: Expired Metadata API key in Xano Request action
symptom: Users are unable to select an endpoint in the Xano Request workflow action due to an expired Metadata API key.

error_signature: white space on the top of PWA
title: White space issue in PWA on Android
symptom: When the PWA is installed on Android, there is an unwanted white space at the top of the app interface.

error_signature: CSS commands do not affect what's shown in the styling panel
title: CSS commands not reflecting in styling panel
symptom: Changes made via CSS commands do not update the styling panel, leading to confusion about the current settings.

error_signature: display issue preventing onClick workflow trigger creation
title: Display issue with onClick workflow trigger in editor
symptom: Users are unable to create onClick workflow triggers due to a display issue in the new editor. The interface does not allow for the expected actions.

error_signature: products are being skipped over in pagination
title: Pagination skips products when using Xano
symptom: When navigating through pages in the paginator, products are skipped, leading to unexpected price jumps. The paginator shows incorrect page counts and results.

error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading ‘RetellWebClient’)
title: Retell SDK fails to initialize due to CSP restrictions
symptom: When attempting to load the Retell SDK, the console shows a TypeError indicating that the RetellWebClient property is undefined. This occurs because the SDK is not loaded correctly due to CSP blocking eval.

error_signature: icons not displaying from custom collection
title: Custom icons not displaying in WeWeb
symptom: After attempting to import a custom icon collection, the icons do not appear in the WeWeb editor. The user sees a broken icon representation when trying to use them.

error_signature: data on the page does not refresh after updating
title: Page data not refreshing after record update
symptom: After updating a record in Xano, the data displayed on the page does not refresh until the page is reloaded or switched.

error_signature: Invalid left-hand side in assignment
title: Error when assigning value to component variable in JS
symptom: The user encounters a 'Invalid left-hand side in assignment' error when trying to change a component variable's value using JavaScript.

error_signature: Workflow shows card data is not changing
title: Kanban card move not updating workflow data
symptom: When dragging a card from one column to another, the visual change occurs, but the workflow does not reflect the updated card data.

error_signature: workspace collection data isn’t automatically fetched
title: Workspace data not updating on user login change
symptom: The list inside the Sidemenu does not display any items until a new item is added after changing logins.

error_signature: workflow trigger is set to 'On execution'
title: Popup workflow not triggering as expected
symptom: The workflow set up for a popup does not execute when the popup appears, leading to no data being fetched.

error_signature: This token belongs to a different object type.
title: Xano authentication token mismatch
symptom: The authentication token is received but results in an unauthorized error when used. The error message indicates that the token belongs to a different object type.

error_signature: async code not returning expected results
title: Async code not returning results in change variable action
symptom: When trying to set a variable with an async function in a change variable action, it does not return the expected value.

error_signature: date picker seems to be readonly
title: Date picker is readonly and does not show calendar icon
symptom: The date picker linked to a date attribute is readonly and does not display a calendar icon, making it unclear to users that it is a date field.

error_signature: failed authentication
title: Failed authentication after Xano plan upgrade
symptom: Users are unable to log into their live Weweb app after upgrading their Xano plan, receiving a 'failed authentication' error.

error_signature: error 500 with Xano 'variable not found'
title: Xano API returns error 500 due to missing user table information
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Xano API, an error 500 occurs with the message 'variable not found'. This prevents successful API calls.

error_signature: code not working in Weweb
title: Code not functioning in Weweb HTML element
symptom: The code works in an HTML editor but fails to execute when pasted into a Weweb HTML element.

error_signature: CODEBUILD_FAILED
title: Build failure due to rich text component library issue
symptom: Users encounter 'CODEBUILD_FAILED' errors when attempting to publish their apps. This issue arose suddenly, affecting previously successful builds.

error_signature: URL not found
title: Incorrect variable reference in custom JS code
symptom: The custom JS function returns 'URL not found' when trying to extract a URL from a string containing a WeWeb variable.

error_signature: button that triggers the workflow is disabled
title: Button triggering workflow is disabled
symptom: The button intended to trigger the workflow does not initiate any action when clicked, and no calls are recorded in Xano.

error_signature: variables and formulas being copied randomly
title: Random duplication of variables and formulas in components
symptom: When copying components, variables and formulas are sometimes duplicated unexpectedly, leading to confusion in the project.

error_signature: horizontal scroll not working inside expanded layout
title: Horizontal scroll issue in expanded layout
symptom: The datagrid does not display a horizontal scroll when placed inside an expanded layout, causing overflow issues.

error_signature: data of the previously logged-in user in the preview mode
title: Data from previous user persists in preview mode
symptom: When switching users in preview mode, data from the previous user is still visible. Edited data also appears blank until the data is reloaded.

error_signature: collections are stuck fetching
title: Collections stuck fetching due to npm package interference
symptom: The collections from various integrations like Supabase and Xano are not loading and remain in a fetching state.

error_signature: array within object not updating
title: Array within object not updating in workflow
symptom: When attempting to partially update an array within an object in a no-code workflow, the array remains empty despite following the expected steps.

error_signature: jQuery not available in WeWeb
title: jQuery methods not supported in WeWeb
symptom: The confetti effect code using jQuery does not execute in WeWeb, while it works in Webflow.

error_signature: 401 error when trying to retrieve the user
title: 401 Error Fetching User Record from Xano
symptom: When attempting to retrieve a user record using Xano, a 401 error is returned. This indicates an authentication issue with the request.

error_signature: image slider shows on top of the mobile and tablet default menu
title: Image slider overlaps mobile and tablet menu
symptom: The image slider is displayed above the mobile and tablet default menu, obstructing it. Adjusting the z-index values did not resolve the issue.

error_signature: unable to extract values from form field component
title: Cannot extract values from custom form field component
symptom: The user is unable to retrieve values entered in a custom form field component when it is used within a collection item.

error_signature: users can only have one role because its a type text column
title: Xano authentication fails due to single role limitation
symptom: Users are unable to log in and are not redirected to the appropriate page despite receiving 200 responses from Xano.

error_signature: empty list
title: Empty list when binding API response to collection list
symptom: The user sees an 'empty list' message when trying to bind API response data to a collection list in WeWeb.

error_signature: Network Error
title: Network Error when calling Xano API
symptom: Users experience a 'Network Error' when uploading photos to Xano via Weweb. This error occurs after several successful uploads, indicating a potential issue with the workflow complexity.

error_signature: unable to download project files
title: Cannot download project files on Essential Plan
symptom: Users on the Essential plan may find that the option to download project files is not visible in their project settings.

error_signature: Empty List
title: Collection list not displaying data
symptom: The collection list shows 'Empty List' despite data being fetched correctly from Xano.

error_signature: checkbox state persists incorrectly after row update
title: Checkbox state persists incorrectly in data table
symptom: After updating a community member's active state, the checkbox state persists in the wrong row, leading to mismatched values between frontend and backend.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of null (reading '1')
title: TypeError in Navigate to action
symptom: When using the 'Navigate to' action in the workflow, a TypeError occurs, indicating that properties of null cannot be read. This prevents the navigation from functioning correctly.

error_signature: width property not applying for data grid columns
title: Data grid column width not applying as expected
symptom: The column widths in the data grid are not adjusting to the flex settings, only the minWidth is effective.

error_signature: Hydration completed but contains mismatches
title: JS hydration mismatch error in custom code component
symptom: The chart does not display in the editor and shows a hydration error in the console after publishing.

error_signature: need to reload the page to see updated votes
title: Votes not updating without page reload
symptom: Users must reload the page to see their vote reflected in the vote count. This leads to a poor user experience.

error_signature: page doesn't exist
title: Accessing gated page results in 'page doesn't exist' error
symptom: An admin user receives an error stating that the 'dashboard' page doesn't exist when trying to access it. Other non-gated pages are accessible without issues.

error_signature: workflow not executing in preview mode
title: Workflow not executing in preview mode
symptom: The workflow works perfectly in 'Test workflow' mode but fails to execute in 'Preview' mode. Conditions and workflows do not trigger as expected.

error_signature: wwLib.wwFormula.getValue is not a function
title: Error with wwLib.wwFormula.getValue in published environment
symptom: Users encounter 'wwLib.wwFormula.getValue is not a function' when trying to log in after publishing their project. The error does not appear in testing mode.

error_signature: Invalid login credentials
title: Invalid login credentials in production
symptom: After publishing the application, users receive an 'Invalid login credentials' error when attempting to log in. This issue does not occur in the development environment.

error_signature: Date picker does not show initial value in Date mode
title: Date picker initial value issue in Date mode
symptom: The DateTime picker displays 'Select a date' as a placeholder instead of the initial date value when set to Date mode.

error_signature: error loading a stylesheet
title: Error loading a stylesheet when adding custom component
symptom: When trying to add a custom component to a project, an error loading a stylesheet occurs, causing the component to fail. This issue does not appear when using an empty project.

error_signature: Safari's Firewall stopped an added NPM
title: Data fetch issue in Safari due to NPM plugin
symptom: The application does not fetch data when opened in Safari, but works fine in Chrome. This issue arose unexpectedly without any republishing.

error_signature: Error 429
title: API Rate Limit Exceeded
symptom: Collections are turning red and displaying error code 429 intermittently. Toggling or testing them temporarily resolves the issue.

error_signature: Supabase realtime not updating the frontend
title: Supabase realtime updates not reflecting on frontend
symptom: Changes made in the Supabase editor do not reflect on the Weweb frontend without a manual refresh.

error_signature: Xano Auth doesn't log in user after account creation
title: Xano Auth fails to log in user after account creation
symptom: When using Google login, the user account is created in Xano, but the user is not logged in. This results in a failed login experience despite account creation.

error_signature: collection not updating with new URL parameter
context_key: dynamic URL parameter on detail page
title: Collection not updating on detail page with new product ID
symptom: The product detail page does not refresh to show the new product when the URL parameter changes, despite the URL updating correctly.

error_signature: build fails to complete
title: Async code in header causes build failure
symptom: Injecting async code into the project header results in a build failure, while the same code works when executed after a button press.

error_signature: cannot save a single object list as an object variable
title: Incompatible variable type when saving API response
symptom: The workflow indicates success for variable updates, but only the first variable is updated. The second variable remains unchanged despite the workflow reporting success.

error_signature: poor typing experience due to rapid input
title: Poor typing experience with Supabase text input
symptom: When typing quickly in a long text input, the changes do not register smoothly, causing a lag in user experience.

error_signature: 500 error screen during Google login
title: 500 error when signing in with Google
symptom: Users encounter a 500 error screen when attempting to log in to their WeWeb account using Google. This issue arises unexpectedly after previously successful logins.

error_signature: first row in the grid disappears after filtering or sorting
title: First row missing in Datagrid after filtering or sorting
symptom: After applying a filter or sorting in the Datagrid, the first row of data is not displayed, despite the footer indicating there are records present.

error_signature: too many redirects
title: App not displaying due to too many redirects
symptom: The app fails to load in preview or live mode, displaying a 'too many redirects' error in the browser.

error_signature: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
title: 404 error when loading resources in custom HTML element
symptom: The console displays a 404 error when trying to load resources linked in a custom HTML element on the published website.

error_signature: date picker not showing in formula builder
title: Date picker fields not visible in formula builder
symptom: Date and time picker fields inside a form container do not appear in the formula builder. Moving them outside the list container makes them visible.

error_signature: overflow for the form section needed to be set to SCROLL
title: Form section overflow not set to SCROLL
symptom: The main section does not expand properly, causing layout issues with the sticky header and footer.

error_signature: NETWORK ERROR
title: Network error when logging into Xano AUTH app
symptom: When attempting to log in to the Xano AUTH app using the 'test' data source, a 'NETWORK ERROR' occurs. The logs indicate that the correct data source is being passed.

error_signature: Failed to load PDF document
title: PDF upload results in empty file in Supabase
symptom: After uploading a PDF file to Supabase, the file size is only 15 bytes, and attempting to download it results in 'Failed to load PDF document'.

error_signature: modal dropdown not scrolling
title: Modal dropdown not scrolling issue
symptom: The dropdown in the modal does not scroll when there are many results, making it difficult to view all options.

error_signature: users are redirected as if they lack the roles
title: Role-based redirection not recognizing Supabase roles
symptom: Users with the correct roles in Supabase are redirected as if they lack access. This occurs even when the app is published.

error_signature: case sensitivity issues with table names
title: Case sensitivity issues with Supabase table names
symptom: When querying tables in Supabase, the user encounters errors due to case sensitivity in table names, leading to empty results or incorrect references.

error_signature: metadata fields are empty
title: Stripe Checkout metadata not sent
symptom: After a successful purchase using the Stripe Checkout plugin, the metadata fields in the charge object are empty.

error_signature: element not recognizing in overflow container
title: Element not recognized in overflow container
symptom: The JavaScript code fails to recognize the chat box element when trying to scroll to the bottom of the container.

error_signature: Error code 401
title: Unauthorized error when sending credentials to Xano
symptom: When sending a request to a Xano endpoint with credentials checked, the user receives an 'Error code 401'. This indicates that the authorization is not being accepted.

error_signature: opens the relevant page when clicking bookmark icon
title: Bookmark icon opens page instead of just bookmarking
symptom: Clicking the bookmark icon not only bookmarks the item but also opens the relevant page, which is unintended behavior.

error_signature: parent item is null
title: Parent item is null when binding image
symptom: When trying to bind an image from a parent list, the system indicates that the parent item is null, despite being able to pull data from the parent list.

error_signature: some endpoint can’t be loaded
title: Xano auth plugin endpoint loading issue
symptom: When setting up the Xano auth plugin, the user encounters an error stating that some endpoints can't be loaded, specifically the signup endpoint.

error_signature: binding a non array value to a div
title: Incorrect binding of user email to text element
symptom: The user is unable to display the authenticated user's email on the dashboard due to improper binding of the data source.

error_signature: cannot reuse newly inserted row in workflow
title: Unable to reuse newly inserted row in workflow
symptom: The user cannot access the newly created team object in their workflow after inserting it into the database.

error_signature: form not submitting due to hidden required element
title: Form submission failure due to hidden required field
symptom: The form does not submit when the submit button is clicked, and required parameters are missing. This results in the form crashing.

error_signature: total record count not returned in response body
title: Total record count not available for custom pagination
symptom: When implementing custom backend pagination with Supabase, the total record count is not returned in the response body, causing issues with the paginator component.

error_signature: deploy button missing from Publish panel
title: Deploy button missing in Publish panel with multiple languages
symptom: The Deploy button is not visible in the Publish panel, only tab headers are shown. Users cannot trigger deployment due to the missing button.

error_signature: only takes me to a unique page
title: Dynamic page navigation not working correctly
symptom: When clicking on any project, the application only navigates to a single project detail page instead of the selected project's details.

error_signature: always getting the same element from the collection
title: Dynamic page/popup returns the same element
symptom: When trying to display filtered values from a dynamic collection, the same element is returned regardless of variable changes. This occurs even after following the tutorial steps.

error_signature: phantom form submissions
title: Phantom form submissions due to click event propagation
symptom: The form submits unexpectedly when a workflow is triggered by a select element's change action. This occurs every time the select element is clicked.

error_signature: verification fails due to CNAME conflict
title: Domain verification fails with CNAME records
symptom: When attempting to verify ownership of a subdomain with Paddle.com, the verification fails due to conflicts with existing CNAME records.

error_signature: modal grey area not covering side menu
title: Modal grey area not covering side menu
symptom: The grey overlay from the modal does not cover the side menu, preventing it from closing the modal when clicked.

error_signature: UI displays the wrong item after deletion
title: UI shows incorrect item after deletion
symptom: After deleting a record at a specific index, the UI incorrectly displays the last record instead of the intended one.

error_signature: status code 401
title: 401 Error on DELETE request with Xano integration
symptom: Weweb shows a status code 401 for DELETE requests, despite Xano successfully deleting the item from the database.

error_signature: unable to change button background from gradient to solid
title: Button background color not changing from gradient to solid
symptom: The button remains in a gradient state even when it should change to a solid color on state change.

error_signature: Supabase personal access tokens not working for self-hosted projects
title: Supabase plugin fails for self-hosted projects
symptom: Users cannot create new projects or edit existing ones in Weweb when using self-hosted Supabase due to the lack of personal access tokens.

error_signature: is not null condition in multi-split doesn't work
title: Multi-option split condition fails for 'is not null'
symptom: The multi-option split workflow step does not correctly evaluate conditions using 'is not null', defaulting to the last option instead.

error_signature: [object Object]
title: Dropdown displaying [object Object] instead of options
symptom: The dropdown shows '[object Object]' instead of the expected text options. The list is either empty or incorrectly formatted.

error_signature: Paginator not going back to 1st page
title: Paginator not resetting to the first page
symptom: The paginator allows navigation to pages 2 and 3 but fails to return to page 1. The left arrow is missing in preview mode, and the right arrow is unresponsive.

error_signature: collections not auto-refreshed on page load
title: Xano collections not refreshing on page load
symptom: Dynamic collections from Xano do not display updated data when the page loads. Users must manually click 'Reload data' to refresh the collections.

error_signature: if statement not transforming into a weweb formula
title: Incorrect if statement format in pricing toggle
symptom: The toggle for changing subscription pricing between monthly and yearly does not work as expected due to a formatting issue in the if statement.

error_signature: Can't see and edit workflows
title: Unable to see and edit workflows due to NPM plugin
symptom: Users are unable to view or edit workflows, and attempts to zoom or fullscreen do not resolve the issue.

error_signature: Select input field does not reset to placeholder
title: Resetting Select Input Field to Placeholder
symptom: After a user removes their selection from a Select input field, the previously selected value remains visible instead of showing the placeholder text.

error_signature: 500 error with output indicating it can't resolve the table
title: Xano OAuth endpoint returns 500 error
symptom: When attempting to authenticate via Google OAuth, a 500 error occurs, indicating the user table cannot be resolved, despite users being created successfully.

error_signature: submit button does not trigger workflow due to hidden required fields
title: Submit button fails due to hidden required fields
symptom: The submit button on the form container does not trigger the workflow when clicked, and no error message is displayed to the user.

error_signature: Month is in French when English is selected
title: Incorrect month language in date format
symptom: When switching to English, the month in the date format remains in French instead of changing to English.

error_signature: sticky position not applying to tabs headers
title: Sticky position not applying to tabs headers
symptom: The headers of the tabs element do not stick to the top when scrolling, despite setting the position to sticky.

error_signature: element does not exist in the page
title: Element not found during custom code execution
symptom: The script fails to find the element '#mynetwork' when executed, resulting in errors. This occurs because the script runs before the element is available in the DOM.

error_signature: CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check
title: CORS issue with Token Based Auth plugin
symptom: The API call to fetch the user fails due to CORS policy, blocking the request. The console shows an error indicating multiple values for 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'.

error_signature: isValid value does not match custom validation output
title: Mismatch between custom validation and isValid field
symptom: The custom validation for a username field outputs the correct boolean, but the main 'isValid' field shows undefined or incorrect values.

error_signature: copilot is not including wwFormulas
title: Copilot not including wwFormulas in generated code
symptom: The generated code from the copilot does not include necessary wwFormulas, leading to errors and empty values in the output.

error_signature: API groups but not the API endpoints
title: Xano plugin not displaying API endpoints
symptom: The Xano source plugin shows API groups but fails to display any API endpoints. This issue started occurring recently for the user.

error_signature: mobile nav bar behind browser's address bar
title: Mobile nav bar obscured by browser's address bar
symptom: The mobile navigation bar is positioned behind the browser's address bar on iOS devices, making it initially invisible until the address bar shrinks.

error_signature: No user found for that email
title: 404 error on password reset due to incorrect user table
symptom: When attempting to reset a password using Xano Auth, a 404 error occurs with the message 'No user found for that email'. This happens because the API is referencing a new, empty User table instead of the existing Users table.

error_signature: default grid height not adjustable
title: Default datagrid height not adjustable
symptom: The datagrid maintains a default height even when set to 'auto', causing layout issues with fewer rows.

error_signature: Current page is too large
title: File uploader component edit fails due to large page size
symptom: When attempting to edit the file uploader component on a large page, the error 'Current page is too large' is displayed.

error_signature: wwFormulas.if executes all parameters
title: wwFormulas.if executes all parameters regardless of condition
symptom: Using wwFormulas.if results in all operations being executed, not just the intended one based on the condition. This leads to unintended behavior in the workflow.

error_signature: PDF viewer downloads instead of displaying
title: PDF viewer downloads file instead of displaying it
symptom: When using the PDF viewer element with a URI, the PDF file downloads instead of being displayed. The sample URL works correctly, indicating an issue with the provided URI.

error_signature: variable not persisting on navigation
title: Variable not persisting after page navigation
symptom: After redirecting to another page, the variable intended to control modal visibility resets to FALSE, despite being set to TRUE in the workflow.

error_signature: Unexpected token ‘<’, "<!doctype "… is not valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON error when toggling Mapbox view
symptom: When attempting to toggle between satellite and street modes in Mapbox, an error occurs stating 'Unexpected token ‘<’, "<!doctype "… is not valid JSON'.
